mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, DIVISION ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{division} )
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_ID, USER_BIR, USER_MAIL, USER_NO ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userBir}, #{userMail}, #{userNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT mem_id AS memId, mem_name AS memName, mem_tel AS memTel, mem_addr AS memAddr, reg_dt AS regDt, atch_file_id AS atchFileId FROM MYMEMBER
